name: Building Fire Response Protocol

steps.action: Activate fire alarm and notify all occupants to evacuate immediately
constraints: Do not use elevators during fire

steps.action: Clear Exit B — ensure all stairwells are accessible and free of obstruction
constraints: Verify exit is smoke-free before directing occupants

steps.action: Set up triage area at Triage Room 101 for any injured persons
constraints: Do not move severely injured persons without stabilization

steps.action: Shut Gas Valve at utility room B2 to prevent escalation
constraints: Verify gas line location on blueprint before shutting
Do not enter if area is smoke-filled

steps.action: Coordinate with fire department upon arrival and provide incident briefing
constraints: Verify before broadcast — confirm fire department ETA
Do not use elevators in a fire
Do not re-enter building until all-clear from fire department
